name: sulis-execution
description: [DEPRECATED — see /sulis:*] Executor + train moved into the sulis plugin at v0.30.0. Use /sulis:run-wp WP-NNN (single WP), /sulis:run-all (whole INDEX), /sulis:retry WP-NNN, /sulis:wp-status, /sulis:backfill-code-review, /sulis:backfill-gates. This plugin retained as a shim for the SDK packages only — sdk/python (sulis-execution PyPI), sdk/typescript (@sulis-ai/execution npm), sdk/mcp-server (sulis-execution-mcp PyPI) remain here with stable package names. Remove this plugin entry when the SDK packages move to a dedicated repo.
